name: Smackin Cracklin Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well.
2. Form the mixture into two pones (round loaves).
3. Place additional shortening or drippings on top of each loaf.
4. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
5. You may use a divided iron skillet or cornstick pan. If you only have a regular skillet, that will work as well.
